name: AbstractPathElementList
javadoc: /** * List of paths AbstractPathElement with same target vertex. * * @author Guillaume Boulmier * @since July 5, 2007 */

members.name: AbstractPathElementList
members.javadoc: /** * Creates paths obtained by concatenating the specified edge to the * specified paths. * * @param maxSize maximum number of paths the list is able to store. * @param elementList paths, list of AbstractPathElement. * @param edge edge reaching the end vertex of the created paths. * * @throws NullPointerException if the specified prevPathElementList or edge * is null. * @throws IllegalArgumentException if maxSize is negative or * 0. */
